title: conyza salicina
intro: Conyza salicina, also known as waterweed or sticky fleabane, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Conyza salicina include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Conyza salicina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
